creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 235721
diff to fix the problem

In ports r3dfc5716e53ef94f0a01b00b094dc43510c29740 I had to mark the port as broken for i386 platform. Thankfully upstream of the failing dependency has a fix committed[0], so submitting it here to unbreak it on i386 platforms.

References:
[0] https://github.com/puzpuzpuz/xsync/pull/42

Thanks!
